serviceDescription.aws: Amazon Kinesis Video Streams makes it easy to securely stream video from connected devices to AWS for analytics, machine learning (ML), playback, and other processing. Kinesis Video Streams automatically provisions and elastically scales all the infrastructure needed to ingest streaming video data from millions of devices.
serviceDescription.aws-cn: Amazon Kinesis Video Streams makes it easy to securely stream video from connected devices to Amazon for analytics, machine learning (ML), playback, and other processing. Kinesis Video Streams automatically provisions and elastically scales all the infrastructure needed to ingest streaming video data from millions of devices.

cards.title: Fleet
cards.helpText: With Amazon Kinesis Video Streams, you pay only for what you use. There are no resources to provision, no upfront costs, or minimum fees.

components.label: Average bitrate
components.description: A typical 720p camera has a bitrate of approximately 512Kbps and higher and for 1080p it is 1.2 Mbps or higher.

cards.title: Ingestion
cards.helpText: Here you can input information on how much video gets sent to Amazon Kinesis Video Streams for ingestion from the producer SDK. Data volume is calculated by multiplying the camera bitrate you provided above by the number of devices by the total duration of video streamed to Amazon Kinesis Video Streams.

components.text: Note: This is only for media ingested via the Amazon Kinesis Video Streams Producer SDK. If you are ingesting media via WebRTC, please see below.

components.label: Number of WebRTC sessions (per camera)
components.description: A signaling channel is considered active in a month if at any time during the month a device (primary) or an application (viewer) connects to it. TURN streaming minutes are metered in 1 minute increments.

components.label: Average length of each WebRTC session (for live view)
TURN Usage
components.description: The default assumption for KVS WebRTC is that TURN is used approximately 30% of the time. For many use cases, including connected home, TURN usage is closer to 10%. Note that TURN usage will also incur costs associated with data transfer out.

cards.title: Storage
cards.helpText: Here you can input information on how much video gets stored in Amazon Kinesis Video Streams. Storage volume is calculated by multiplying the volume of data ingested in a month by the retention period defined in this section.
